## What & why

Briefly describe the change and the motivation.

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run check` passes
- [ ] `npm run test:unit` passes
- [ ] No secrets / `.env` / personal or brand data committed (example configs stay generic)
- [ ] Respects the "brand overrides content, not layout" rule (see [CLAUDE.md](../CLAUDE.md))
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior/flags changed (`README.md` / `docs/CLI.md`)
